name: Travelport Worldwide Limited
description: Travelport is a global technology company that provides a modern travel retailing platform designed to simplify the complex travel ecosystem. By offering distribution, technology, and payment solutions, the company empowers travel agencies, airlines, hotels, and other suppliers to sell smarter and operate more efficiently. Through its flagship platform, Travelport+, the company delivers intuitive tools, rich content, and seamless workflows that help travel sellers provide personalized experiences to their customers. Headquartered in the United Kingdom, Travelport continues to transform the industry by focusing on faster, smarter, and more agile digital retailing solutions.
